title: ClientHarvest
description: Allows you to harvest and replant crops at the same time with ease by pressing right click on client side on any server!
body:
# ClientHarvest

ClientHarvest aims to be the clientside version of [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) and is based on it.
Harvest crops with ease, on any server you like!
## Usage

Right click on a crop to harvest and replant it at the same time!

(Note: you need to be holding the seed(planning to improve in ~~1.0.4~~ maybe later))

Toggle on/off by pressing G in mod version 1.0.4 (keybind can be changed in options)


Works for:
- Wheet
- Carrots
- Beetroot
